cases.title: Harbor Vandalism
cases.description: Multiple storefronts were vandalized in the harbor district.

cases.title: Westside Shoplifting
cases.description: A series of shoplifting incidents at Westside Mall.

cases.title: Elm Street Burglary
cases.description: A burglary occurred on Elm Street. Several valuable items were stolen from a residence.

cases.title: Riverside Arson
cases.description: A warehouse near the river was set on fire.

cases.title: Northgate Identity Theft
cases.description: Multiple residents reported stolen identities in the Northgate area.

cases.title: Old Town Pickpocketing
cases.description: A pickpocket has been targeting tourists in Old Town.

cases.title: Midtown Cybercrime
cases.description: A hacker breached a Midtown company's servers and stole sensitive customer data.

cases.title: Downtown Fraud
cases.description: An employee at a downtown financial firm is suspected of embezzling company funds.

cases.title: Eastside Scam
cases.description: A Ponzi scheme targeting Eastside retirees has been uncovered.

cases.title: Suburban Heights Break-in
cases.description: A home was broken into in the wealthy Suburban Heights neighborhood.

cases.title: Waterfront Smuggling
cases.description: Suspicious shipping containers were found at the Waterfront.

cases.title: Lakeside Homicide
cases.description: A body was found near Lakeside Park. Suspicious circumstances surround the death.

cases.title: University District Assault
cases.description: An assault occurred near the university campus.

cases.title: Industrial Zone Theft
cases.description: Equipment was stolen from the Industrial Zone construction site.

cases.title: Central Park Mugging
cases.description: A series of muggings have been reported in Central Park.

cases.title: Downtown Embezzlement
cases.description: A city official is suspected of embezzling public funds from the municipal treasury.

cases.title: Pine Valley Burglary
cases.description: A series of burglaries in Pine Valley have residents on edge.

cases.title: Maple Heights Fraud
cases.description: Insurance fraud suspected in multiple claims from Maple Heights.

cases.title: Cedar Ridge Vandalism
cases.description: Property damage reported at Cedar Ridge business district.

cases.title: Oak Grove Cybercrime
cases.description: A ransomware attack has hit the Oak Grove hospital system.

evidence.description: Fingerprints matching Grace Miller's prints were found at the scene
IP traces of the unauthorized access led back to Walter Clark's device
A witness identified Patricia Campbell near the scene on the night of the incident
All suspicious transactions originated from Helena Bailey's workstation
IP traces of the unauthorized access led back to Xander Brown's device
Digital forensics link the cybercrime to suspicious activity in the Elm Street area (CASE-003)
A witness saw someone matching the description of the Downtown Embezzlement suspect near Elm Street
Phone records link the Lakeside Homicide suspect to communications with someone in Oak Grove
Security footage from the area is blurry and inconclusive
Security footage from the area is blurry and inconclusive
Security footage from the area is blurry and inconclusive
